changeSet.author: hrms
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE salary_structures ( id UUID PRIMARY KEY, tenant_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, employee_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, effective_date DATE NOT NULL, basic_salary DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL, hra DECIMAL(15,2), transport_allowance DECIMAL(15,2), medical_allowance DECIMAL(15,2), special_allowance DECIMAL(15,2), other_allowances DECIMAL(15,2), gross_salary DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL, provident_fund DECIMAL(15,2), professional_tax DECIMAL(15,2), income_tax DECIMAL(15,2), other_deductions DECIMAL(15,2), total_deductions DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL, net_salary DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL, currency VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'INR', is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, remarks TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, version BIGINT DEFAULT 0 );
CREATE INDEX idx_salary_structures_tenant ON salary_structures(tenant_id); CREATE INDEX idx_salary_structures_employee ON salary_structures(employee_id); CREATE INDEX idx_salary_structures_effective_date ON salary_structures(effective_date); CREATE INDEX idx_salary_structures_active ON salary_structures(is_active);
